mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_tenant WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_tenant WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_tenant WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_tenant (tenant_id, name, status, tier, config_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{status}, #{tier}, #{configJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tenant SET name = #{name}, status = #{status}, tier = #{tier}, config_json = #{configJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_tenant SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
